description: Monitors ASP.NET Core applications using the OpenTelemetry .NET automatic instrumentation metrics (HTTP server, Kestrel, runtime and process) scraped via Prometheus.
title: ASP.NET Core

efd0d244-b7c3-440e-b6f7-3c1f360ea468.name: deployment_environment
efd0d244-b7c3-440e-b6f7-3c1f360ea468.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment_environment'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'http_server_request_duration_seconds_count'

63931c70-089c-4475-88ea-7aa516be3dad.name: service_name
63931c70-089c-4475-88ea-7aa516be3dad.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'service_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'http_server_request_duration_seconds_count'

widgets.description: Connections waiting to be processed and queued requests.
widgets.title: Queued Connections / Requests

widgets.description: 99th percentile Kestrel connection duration in seconds.
widgets.title: Connection Duration (p99)

widgets.description: Rate of garbage collections by generation.
widgets.title: GC Collections / sec

widgets.description: Number of threads in the thread pool.
widgets.title: Thread Pool Threads

widgets.description: Seconds spent in JIT compilation per second.
widgets.title: JIT Compilation Time / sec

widgets.description: Number of OS threads in the process.
widgets.title: Process Threads
